properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Holy, Holy I will bow before My Lord and King Hallelujah, you have come to us You make all things new

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Emmanuel, Jesus Christ You'll never let me go My shepherd King You're watching over me Emmanuel

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So amazing, you have named the stars Of the deepest night Still you love me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You have called my name I will follow you Emmanuel, Jesus Christ You'll never let me go

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My shepherd King You're watching over me Emmanuel, Emmanuel, Emmanuel, Emmanuel

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Holy, Holy God almighty There is none like you Holy, Holy God almighty

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: There is none like you Emmanuel, Jesus Christ You'll never let me go
